query: Find the 20 most talked about movie social-media posts in the last 24h for: What are the most talked about movies on social media. Return strict JSON array with tweet_url,text,author and avoid generic praise/thanks posts.

status.output:

  {\"tweet_url\": \"https://x.com/DoctorLemma/status/2030334663894487310\", \"text\": \"In 2022, a cook at a Burger King inside an airport in Las Vegas posted a video showing the gift he received for 27 years of work without missing a single day.
